title: DNA shape and epigenomics distinguish the mechanistic origin of human genomic structural variations.
author: Boev NB Gerstein MB Kumar S
content: S-EPMC12709195 PMC12709195 DNA shape and epigenomics distinguish the mechanistic origin of human genomic structural variations.
